vibe: Industrial, precise, authoritative, and rugged. Designed for heavy machinery parts catalog. Function over form, zero muddy gradients, stark high-contrast layouts.

technical_data.font_family: JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono, monospace
technical_data.usage: SKUs, prices (500-30000 UAH), dimensions, part numbers.

rules: No full-screen gradients. Solid, stark colors only.
Primary brand color (#FF3B30) is strictly for main CTAs (Add to Cart, Buy, Mono Checkout) and crucial alerts.
Backgrounds must be tinted greys (e.g., #F7F7F8), never pure #000000 or #FFFFFF without a 1px border separator.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Highly dense, functional bento grids for catalogs.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use sharp borders (1px solid #EBECEE) with minimal border-radius (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all product data. Center alignment only for hero headlines or empty states.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hard brutalist shifts. e.g., hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white. No soft fades.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#D92C23] active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white

cards.product: bg-white border border-[#EBECEE] p-4 flex flex-col gap-4 group hover:border-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors rounded-none
cards.widget: bg-white border border-[#EBECEE] p-6 shadow-sm rounded-none

inputs.default: border border-[#D1D3D8] bg-white px-4 py-3 rounded-none focus:border-[#0A0A0A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A0A0A] font-mono text-sm
inputs.search: Extremely prominent search bar in header. 48px height, heavy border.

navigation.header: Sticky, bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EBECEE] z-50

badges.price: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white px-3 py-1 font-mono text-lg font-bold
badges.category: bg-[#F7F7F8] border border-[#EBECEE] text-[#474A51] px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

data_display.tables: Dense, 1px border grid layout. Zebras striping for rows. Monospace for numerical data (Admin panel).

hero_banner.description: Detailed view of a shiny and modern automotive engine with metal components. Use as main hero image with max bg-black/40 overlay to ensure visibility.

category_engine.description: Close-up image of car engine pistons. Use for Engines category card.

category_chassis.description: Heavy duty construction equipment showcasing industrial strength. Use for Chassis / Heavy machinery section.

category_general.description: Aerial shot of heavy machinery. Use for general catalog banner or background texture.

instructions_to_main_agent.1_setup: Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS. Install lucide-react, @radix-ui/react-icons, and framer-motion. Set up routing for Home, Catalog, Product Details, Cart, Checkout, Auth (Login/Register), Profile, and Admin Panel.
instructions_to_main_agent.2_fonts: Import 'Clash Display' (or 'Cabinet Grotesk') for headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for body, and 'IBM Plex Mono' for prices and SKUs. Apply globally in Tailwind config.
instructions_to_main_agent.3_components: Use Shadcn UI primarily but heavily strip its default Vercel-look. Remove all border-radius (rounded-none). Make borders 1px solid high contrast. Use a brutalist/industrial approach.
instructions_to_main_agent.4_features: Implement JWT mock or real flow for Login/Register. Build a robust Product Catalog filtering system (by Category: Двигатели, Трансмиссия, Гидравлика, Электрика, Ходовая часть; and Price: 500 - 30000 UAH).
instructions_to_main_agent.5_cart_checkout: Build a slide-out cart drawer. In checkout, integrate a placeholder module for 'Plata by Mono' with Mono's iconic black/cat branding elements or strict stark financial UI.
instructions_to_main_agent.6_admin: Build a dense, technical Admin Panel for managing the spare parts. Use grid layouts and tight data tables. Include order history tracking.
instructions_to_main_agent.7_testing: Ensure all interactive elements have explicit `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='add-to-cart-btn'`, `data-testid='price-filter-input'`).
instructions_to_main_agent.8_language: The problem statement asks for UI in Russian/Ukrainian context (Сделай сайт по продаже запчастей...). Provide the static text and categories primarily in Russian as requested.
